response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video to identify song performances. 
2. Detected 'Mela!' by Ryokuoushoku Shakai starting at 00:00. 
3. Detected a transition to talking around 02:18, followed by another performance at 03:28.
4. Detected '劣等上等' (Rettou Joutou) by Giga starting at 03:28.
5. Performed searches for 'Mela! YOASOBI lyrics' (corrected original artist: Ryokuoushoku Shakai) and '劣等上等 Giga lyrics'.
6. Found lyrics for both.
7. Structured the JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video captures two musical performances by VTuber Amane Kanata during her graduation concert. The first song performed is 'Mela!' by Ryokuoushoku Shakai, and the second is '劣等上等' (Rettou Joutou) by Giga. The video includes both performance segments and a short interlude featuring the performer speaking to the audience.

scenes.description: Amane Kanata performs 'Mela!' by Ryokuoushoku Shakai. The performance features dramatic lighting and stage pyrotechnics.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Isn't it now? 
Burn and rage 
The justice that was just sleeping 
I want to be your hero too 
For you, who are so cool 
Are you saying that I'm unreliable? 
Well, that may be true 
Because I'm still hesitating like this 
Won't you take my hand? 
It's give and take 
Just like you were my hero 
Isn't it now? 
Burning and raging 
The justice that hides even in a me like this 
Driven by an irresistible impulse 
Look, before I knew it, I'm holding your hand 
What on earth 
Are you carrying so much baggage to go, where are you going? 
Hey, hey, wait, why not leave it with me for a bit? 
With me, who just believes 
And you, who are afraid to believe 
Which one is correct? 
Nobody knows 
Our own world 
It's give and take 
At the dawn when we can make up for each other, I want to see the same dream 
You make me suffer by saying I'm cool 
Making me lonely 
It's a little bit my fault, I'm sorry 
But what I should look at is reality 
Now is the time I will save you 
I want you to rely on me and believe without carrying it alone 
Isn't it now? 
Burning and raging 
The justice that hides even in a me like this 
Driven by an irresistible impulse 
Look, before I knew it, I'm holding your hand 
I can't leave it 
Are you carrying so much baggage to go, where are you going? 
Why not just a little, leave it with me for a bit? 
I want to be your hero too
